description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI and CD that runs on every push to the master branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: tests and deploy. The tests job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, runs a one-line script, starts the environment with make start-containers, and runs tests with make params=-T tests. The deploy job depends on the tests job, sets up an SSH agent, installs Ansible, and deploys using an Ansible playbook.
